channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Yes, Students Should Be Taught What to Think
item.description: A truly neutral education would disregard many core principles educators consider essential.

item.title: Media Criticize Susan Collins for Noting Platner's Background
item.description: As expected, it is now the season for seizing opportunities.

item.title: The Well-Being of Military Families Requires Attention
item.description: Data indicate a concerning trend: America's service member families are worn out.

item.title: Trump's Literal Cleanup in Washington D.C.
item.description: The saying that everything Trump touches dies apparently does not apply to the fountain.
